div.p: Open WhatsApp on your phone > Settings > WhatsApp Web/Desktop > Scan QR Code

field.name: provider
field.help: WhatsApp API Provider (WhatsApp Business API, WhatsApp Web, etc.)

field.name: phone_number_id
field.help: Phone Number ID from WhatsApp Business API

field.name: body_text
field.placeholder: Enter your message template body here... Use {{1}}, {{2}} for variable parameters

group.div: Use curly braces with numbers for variables: {"{{1}}"}, {"{{2}}"}, etc. Each variable will be replaced with actual values when sending.
